route53recoverycontrol.routingcontrol.Cl.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the cluster that includes the routing control.

route53recoverycontrol.routingcontrol.Co.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the control panel that includes the routing control.

route53recoverycontrol.routingcontrol.Na.Description: The name of the routing control. You can use any non-white space character in the name.
